title: Gnarly Peppery Thai Tarragon Pad See Ew
description: A peppery and crispy Thai dish featuring tarragon leaves, this pad see ew is a central Thai inspired recipe with a shojin friendly twist, using salt bake method to bring out the flavors.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium high heat.
Add the minced garlic and sliced Thai bird eye chili and stir fry until fragrant.
Add the chopped tarragon leaves and stir fry for another minute.
Add the rice noodles and stir fry for 2 minutes.
Add the soy sauce, salt, and black pepper, and stir fry for another minute.
Use the salt bake method by sprinkling salt around the wok or skillet and stir frying for 30 seconds.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Transfer the pad see ew to a serving platter and garnish with additional tarragon leaves if desired.
